zh.lifeSummary: 當Knight Henry de Dene於1235年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾維斯特波利 奧 澤福時，他的父親William DeDene35歲，母親Isabel de  Abenhall25歲。他於1260年與Agatha de Lasseberg在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1292年3月9日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Knight Henry de Dene于1235年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾維斯特波利 奧 澤福时，他的父亲William DeDene35岁，母亲Isabel de  Abenhall25岁。他于1260年与Agatha de Lasseberg在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1292年3月9日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dahn
meanings: habitational name from a place in the Palatinate called Dahn.
(Dähn): ethnic name for a Dane, from Old Norse Dan-.

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Knight Henry de Dene was born in 1235, in Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William DeDene, was 35 and his mother, Isabel de  Abenhall, was 25. He married Agatha de Lasseberg in 1260, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 9 March 1292, in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

Il a épousé Agatha de Lasseberg en 1260, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 9 mars 1292, à St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Knight Henry de Dene(이)가 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 웨스트버이  세버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William DeDene(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de  Abenhall(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Agatha de Lasseberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1292년 3월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Westbury On Severn, Gloucestershire, Eng: вестбури он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knight Henry de Dene родился в 1235 г. в местности вестбури он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William DeDene было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de  Abenhall, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha de Lasseberg в 1260 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 9 марта 1292 г. в местности ст брявелс, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
